content.question: Would closing village schools and consolidating pupils into larger hub schools in Hungary reduce, relocate, or intensify ethnic and socioeconomic sorting, and for which student subgroups?
content.reduction_path: Conduct matched-sample analysis of villages where closures have occurred versus control villages post-2013, comparing between-settlement versus within-school segregation indices before and after closure, disaggregated by Roma and non-Roma student distributions and by school-choice mechanisms at receiving hub schools
